content: Drain3 (logpai) is the de-facto streaming log template miner: tokenise, fixed-depth prefix-tree search by token count/first tokens, similarity match, template create/update with volatile tokens masked to wildcards. Standard pipeline practice: strip structured header fields (timestamp, host, severity) first and mine only the free-text message body; template groups carry count/first-last-seen/exemplars and feed downstream clustering. Validates Sift's template-dedup-before-embedding stage.
